== Notes for [[Item:Q85193|Q85193]] ==

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Family_tree_of_Uthman

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Uthman_ibn_Affan#Family_of_Uthman

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
671E3145E18EF1EFBC189822EF79916C3D4F
geni:6000000021368355267

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
